roster_delta.desc: Philadelphia Phillies signed free agent C Payton Henry to a minor league contract.
Philadelphia Phillies traded RHP Ryan Degges to Cleveland Guardians for cash.
Philadelphia Phillies recalled LHP Tanner Banks from Lehigh Valley IronPigs.
RHP Stephen Kolek roster status changed by Kansas City Royals.
Kansas City Royals recalled RHP Jose Cuas from Omaha Storm Chasers.
New York Yankees recalled RHP Brendan Beck from Scranton/Wilkes-Barre RailRiders.
New York Yankees optioned CF Spencer Jones to Scranton/Wilkes-Barre RailRiders.
New York Yankees optioned RHP Brendan Beck to Scranton/Wilkes-Barre RailRiders.
New York Yankees recalled RHP Angel Chivilli from Scranton/Wilkes-Barre RailRiders.
Tampa Bay Rays optioned RHP Trevor Martin to Durham Bulls.
Tampa Bay Rays recalled RHP Mason Englert from Durham Bulls.
Houston Astros activated 1B LaMonte Wade Jr. from the 10-day injured list.
Houston Astros optioned CF Jake Meyers to Sugar Land Space Cowboys.
Houston Astros optioned LF Joey Loperfido to Sugar Land Space Cowboys.
Houston Astros recalled LF Zach Dezenzo from Sugar Land Space Cowboys.
Washington Nationals designated RHP Andre Granillo for assignment.
Washington Nationals claimed LHP Matt Krook off waivers from Athletics.

New York Mets optioned RHP Joey Gerber to Syracuse Mets.

Atlanta Braves activated DH Kyle Farmer from the 10-day injured list.
Atlanta Braves placed SS Ha-Seong Kim on the 10-day injured list retroactive to July 1, 2026. Right middle finger inflammation.
Atlanta Braves optioned RHP Anthony Molina to Gwinnett Stripers.
Atlanta Braves sent 1B Rowdy Tellez outright to Gwinnett Stripers.

Atlanta Braves optioned RHP JR Ritchie to Gwinnett Stripers.

Toronto Blue Jays placed DH George Springer on the bereavement list.
San Francisco Giants placed LHP Matt Gage on the 15-day injured list. Left embow strain.
San Francisco Giants recalled RHP Spencer Bivens from Sacramento River Cats.
Colorado Rockies placed RHP Seth Halvorsen on the 15-day injured list retroactive to July 1, 2026. Right shoulder inflammation.
Colorado Rockies placed RHP Tomoyuki Sugano on the 15-day injured list retroactive to July 1, 2026. Back spasms.
Colorado Rockies selected the contract of RHP Jordan Romano from Albuquerque Isotopes.
Colorado Rockies recalled LHP Sean Sullivan from Albuquerque Isotopes.
